ideation: This animation sequence depicts a person holding onto the poles inside a subway car.  The motion will involve a slight lean forward and a gripping motion with both arms.  The robot does not have hands or fingers but we can create a reasonable approximation of this gesture. We will ensure that this is done in a smooth and natural way by leveraging the robot's two-joint system and referencing previous examples for realistic arm movement.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, ready for the ride
both arms reach forward, gripping poles firmly
leaning into the motion, holding tight
arms pull back slightly, steadying the stance
